Now, translate the article into German, keeping the same structure. Use technical, direct language. Avoid softening. Preserve code blocks exactly. Now, translate the prose. Use German technical terms. For "connection strings" -> "Verbindungsstrings" or "Connection-Strings"? I'll use "Verbindungsstrings" but keep the English term in code. For "LLM" keep as is. For "env var explosion" -> "Umgebungsvariablen-Explosion". For "bad old days" -> "schlechten alten Zeiten". For "tower of delicate config" -> "Turm aus fragiler Konfiguration".
